react-aria.description: OFFICIAL (Adobe) — browse all React Aria Components docs, fetch component markdown, preview page structure

copilotkit.description: OFFICIAL (CopilotKit) — AG-UI / CopilotKit live API signatures and code examples. No auth required.

storybook.description: OFFICIAL (Storybook team) — list stories, capture screenshots, generate stories. Requires: pnpm storybook + @storybook/addon-mcp installed.

vitest.description: COMMUNITY (djankies) — AI-safe Vitest runner, structured output, coverage analysis, prevents full-suite runs. Not official Vitest team.

npm-registry.description: COMMUNITY (pinkpixel-dev) — search npm packages, check versions, audit vulnerabilities. Not official npm.
